gene_region.label: PIK3CA transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical PIK3CA genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window used by this app to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval begins.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: PIK3CA encodes the p110-alpha catalytic subunit of class IA phosphoinositide 3-kinase. This bundle emphasizes PI3K lipid kinase signaling, PIP3 production, AKT-mTOR activation, cell growth, metabolism, and survival.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local PIK3CA bundle is PI3K pathway signaling oriented. Interpret markers through exact allele class, zygosity, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context rather than as stand-alone deterministic calls.
variant_effect_overview: PIK3CA variants can alter or tag PI3K lipid kinase signaling, PIP3 production, AKT-mTOR activation, cell growth, metabolism, and survival; effect direction depends on allele class, tissue, dosage, and biological context.
Common markers, pharmacogenetic alleles, structural events, and high-impact pathogenic variants should be kept separate during interpretation.
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: PIK3CA methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a PI3K lipid kinase signaling, PIP3 production, AKT-mTOR activation, cell growth, metabolism, and survival gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for PIK3CA.
Because PIK3CA biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.
Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against PI3K lipid kinase signaling, PIP3 production, AKT-mTOR activation, cell growth, metabolism, and survival.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use PIK3CA promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for PI3K lipid kinase signaling, PIP3 production, AKT-mTOR activation, cell growth, metabolism, and survival.

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000121879: PIK3CA coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: PIK3CA biochemical figure starter
biorender_visuals.focus: PIK3CA: PI3K lipid kinase signaling, PIP3 production, AKT-mTOR activation, cell growth, metabolism, and survival
biorender_visuals.template_title: Intracellular Layout - Receptor Signaling from Plasma Membrane to Nucleus (2)
biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a PIK3CA PI3K pathway signaling thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to PI3K lipid kinase signaling, PIP3 production, AKT-mTOR activation, cell growth, metabolism, and survival and PI3K-AKT-mTOR signaling and cancer context, Overgrowth and mosaic activation review. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: PIK3CA E542K/E545K/H1047R model is curated as a PIK3CA marker for PI3K-AKT-mTOR signaling and cancer context, Overgrowth and mosaic activation review. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the PI3K lipid kinase signaling, PIP3 production, AKT-mTOR activation, cell growth, metabolism, and survival pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag PI3K lipid kinase signaling, PIP3 production, AKT-mTOR activation, cell growth, metabolism, and survival.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
research_context: Use this marker as a PIK3CA pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair PIK3CA E542K/E545K/H1047R model with PIK3CA methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.

literature_findings.genotypes: PIK3CA E542K/E545K/H1047R model or linked PIK3CA locus genotype states
literature_findings.phenotype: PI3K-AKT-mTOR signaling and cancer context, Overgrowth and mosaic activation review
literature_findings.finding: The local curation treats PIK3CA E542K/E545K/H1047R model as a gene-specific marker for PI3K-AKT-mTOR signaling and cancer context, Overgrowth and mosaic activation review and PI3K lipid kinase signaling, PIP3 production, AKT-mTOR activation, cell growth, metabolism, and survival.
